tasks.name: Request an asphalt resurfacing quote for a 400 sq ft driveway on a weekday morning
tasks.description: Submit an online quote request for asphalt resurfacing of a 400 sq ft driveway using the standard material option, selecting the earliest available weekday appointment within the next 30 days between 9:00–11:00 AM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Get a Quote" or "Request Estimate".
On the quote request page, click the service option labeled "Asphalt Resurfacing" or the closest matching asphalt driveway resurfacing service.
In the driveway size input, type "400" and select "square feet" as the unit from the size unit dropdown.
In the material or finish section, select the option labeled "Standard" (not "Premium" or "Economy").
Click on the appointment date field to open the date picker and choose the earliest weekday (Monday–Friday) that falls within the next 30 calendar days.
In the time of day or time slot options, select a slot that starts between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM; if multiple slots qualify, choose the earliest available slot.
In the contact information form, enter "Jordan Smith" as the full name, "555-0123" as the phone number, and "jordan.smith@example.com" as the email address.
Click the primary button labeled "Submit Quote Request" or similar to send the asphalt resurfacing quote request.

tasks.name: Book a concrete driveway installation under a $9,000 budget with a 3-year warranty
tasks.description: Find a concrete driveway installation package for a 600 sq ft driveway that includes at least a 3-year warranty and costs less than $9,000 total, then start the booking process and proceed to the checkout review page with the chosen package selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Services" and then select "Concrete Driveways" or the closest concrete driveway installation service.
On the concrete driveway service page, locate the package or pricing section and identify all packages suitable for approximately 600 sq ft driveways.
Among these packages, find the ones that list a warranty of at least 3 years and a total price under $9,000; if more than one qualifies, choose the cheapest option that meets both criteria.
Click the "Select", "Book Now", or similar button for the chosen concrete driveway package.
On the booking form, enter "600" in the driveway size field and confirm "square feet" as the unit if a unit dropdown is present.
In the payment preference or deposit section, select a payment method labeled "Credit/Debit Card" or the closest online payment option instead of any cash-on-site option.
Fill in the customer information fields with a name (e.g., "Alex Rivera"), a phone number (e.g., "555-0456"), and an email (e.g., "alex.rivera@example.com").
Click the button labeled "Continue" or "Proceed to Review" to go to the checkout or booking review page with the selected package and details populated.

tasks.name: Schedule the cheapest driveway sealing plan that includes crack filling and a 2-year warranty
tasks.description: From the driveway sealing service options, find the cheapest plan that includes crack filling and at least a 2-year warranty, configure it for a 2-car driveway, and schedule the service on the next available Saturday afternoon.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" menu and choose "Driveway Sealing" or the closest sealing and maintenance option.
On the sealing services page, review the listed plans and identify all options that include "crack filling" and a warranty of at least 2 years.
Among those qualifying plans, compare their prices and select the cheapest plan that meets both the crack filling and 2-year warranty criteria.
Click the "Book", "Select Plan", or similar button for that cheapest qualifying sealing plan.
In any driveway size or type section, choose an option indicating a "2-car driveway" or enter "2-car driveway" in a relevant field if required.
Open the date selector and find the next available Saturday from today; select that Saturday date.
In the available time slots for that Saturday, select an option that begins at or after 12:00 PM (afternoon); if multiple qualify, choose the earliest afternoon slot.

Enter customer details with name "Morgan Lee", phone "555-0789", and email "morgan.lee@example.com", then click the primary button labeled "Schedule Service" or similar to finalize the booking request.

tasks.name: Save three similar asphalt driveway projects between 400–800 sq ft from the gallery
tasks.description: Use the project gallery to find and save three asphalt driveway projects sized between 400 and 800 sq ft, completed within the last 2 years, adding each to a favorites or comparison list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Gallery", "Projects", or "Our Work" to open the project gallery.
In any filter or category section, select the project type labeled "Asphalt Driveways" or the closest matching asphalt category.
If a size filter is available, set the minimum size to "400" sq ft and the maximum size to "800" sq ft; if a completion date filter exists, limit results to projects completed in the last 2 years.
Scroll through the filtered project results and click on the first project that meets the asphalt and size criteria to open its details page.
On the project details page, click the action labeled "Add to Favorites", "Save Project", or "Add to Compare" to save this project.

Use the gallery navigation (back button or gallery link) to return to the filtered project list, then open two additional different asphalt projects within the 400–800 sq ft range and completed in the last 2 years.

For each of these two additional projects, open its details page and use the same "Add to Favorites" or "Add to Compare" control to save them, resulting in a total of three saved asphalt driveway projects.
Finally, click on the "Favorites" or "Comparison" section in the header or account area to navigate to the page where the three saved projects are listed together.

tasks.name: Check service coverage for ZIP 30301 and request an exception if not directly served
tasks.description: Use the service area tools to look up coverage for ZIP code 30301; if it is not directly served, choose the nearest listed serviced ZIP, then submit a contact form asking whether service can be extended to 30301.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled "Service Area", "Areas We Serve", or similar.
On the service area page, find the ZIP code search or location search field and type "30301" into it, then click the associated search or "Check" button.

If the results indicate that 30301 is not directly served, review any list or map of serviced ZIP codes and identify the serviced ZIP code that appears closest to 30301 (e.g., the numerically nearest or explicitly marked nearby area).
Click on that nearest serviced ZIP code or associated area name to open its detail or information section.
From this area detail page, click a visible "Contact Us", "Request Service", or "Ask About My Area" link or button.
On the contact form, enter your name as "Taylor Green", email as "taylor.green@example.com", and phone as "555-0990".

In the message or comments field, type a brief request asking if driveway and paving services can be provided in ZIP code 30301, mentioning that the nearest serviced ZIP you saw was the one you selected.
Click the primary button labeled "Send Message", "Submit", or similar to submit the service area inquiry.

tasks.name: Apply a 15%+ promo code for a 500+ sq ft project during booking
tasks.description: Find a promotion that offers at least 15% off for driveway or paving projects of 500 sq ft or more, then start a booking for a 550 sq ft project and apply that specific promo code on the booking summary page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the link or menu item labeled "Deals", "Special Offers", or "Promotions".

On the promotions page, scan the listed offers and identify any promo code that provides at least a 15% discount on driveway or paving projects with a minimum project size requirement of 500 sq ft or less; if multiple qualify, choose the one with the highest discount percentage.

Note the exact promo code text (for example, "PAVE15" or similar) and click any associated "Use Offer" or "Book Now" button if available; if not, navigate back to the homepage and click "Get a Quote".
On the quote or booking page, select a general driveway paving or installation service that matches the promo code’s service type (e.g., "Asphalt Driveway" or "Paver Driveway").
In the project size field, enter "550" and select "square feet" as the unit if a unit selection is required, ensuring the size meets the 500+ sq ft requirement.
Proceed to the booking summary or checkout page by clicking the button labeled "Continue", "Next", or similar.
On the summary page, locate the promo code or coupon field, type the previously chosen promo code exactly as shown, and click the associated "Apply" or "Add" button.
Fill in the basic contact fields with a name (e.g., "Jamie Ortiz"), phone (e.g., "555-0678"), and email (e.g., "jamie.ortiz@example.com") to complete the booking setup with the promo code applied.

tasks.name: Request an estimate from the highest-rated asphalt replacement crew with 50+ reviews
tasks.description: Use the reviews or contractors section to find asphalt driveway replacement crews, sort them by rating, and choose a crew with at least 50 reviews and an average rating of 4.5 stars or higher, then send an estimate request from that crew’s profile.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Reviews", "Our Teams", or "Contractors" to open the reviews or crews listing page.
Use any filter or category controls to select "Asphalt Driveway Replacement" or the closest matching asphalt replacement service type.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the crews or contractors by "Rating: High to Low" or a similar highest-rated option.

From the sorted list, identify the first crew or contractor that shows at least 4.5 out of 5 stars and 50 or more total reviews; if the first crew does not meet both numbers, scroll until you find one that does.
Click on that qualifying crew’s name or profile image to open their detailed profile page.
On the crew profile, click the button labeled "Request Estimate", "Get a Quote", or similar.
On the estimate request form, select "Asphalt Driveway Replacement" as the service type and enter "650" as the approximate driveway size in square feet.
Complete the remaining fields with a name (e.g., "Riley Chen"), phone (e.g., "555-0345"), and email (e.g., "riley.chen@example.com"), then click the main "Submit Estimate Request" button.

tasks.name: Sign up for a seasonal snow removal plan under $600 with up to 20 visits
tasks.description: Find a seasonal driveway snow removal plan for a 50 ft driveway that includes up to 20 visits and costs less than $600, then start the signup process and choose the "pay per season" billing option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" menu and select "Snow Removal" or the closest winter driveway service option.
On the snow removal services page, locate the seasonal plans and identify those that explicitly include up to 20 visits (or a maximum of 20 visits) for a driveway of about 50 feet in length.
Among the qualifying seasonal plans, compare the listed prices and choose a plan that costs less than $600; if more than one plan is under $600, select the cheapest one.
Click the "Sign Up", "Select Plan", or similar button for the chosen seasonal snow removal plan.
On the configuration or details form, enter "50" in the driveway length field and select "feet" as the unit if required.
In the billing or payment options section, choose the option labeled "Pay per Season" rather than any per-visit or monthly billing options.
Enter customer information such as name "Pat Morgan", phone "555-0112", and email "pat.morgan@example.com" in the appropriate fields.
Click the button labeled "Continue", "Submit", or "Complete Sign Up" to finalize the seasonal snow removal plan enrollment setup.

entities.name: Service
entities.description: Top-level driveway/paving service categories shown on service.html and used throughout the site

fields.name: id
fields.description: Matches serviceId in URLs, e.g. concrete_driveways, driveway_sealing

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name, e.g. 'Concrete Driveways'

fields.name: service_type
fields.description: Canonical service type used by packages, promos, crews, etc.

fields.name: category
fields.description: High-level category for grouping services

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this service is currently offered

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Controls display ordering in service lists

entities.name: ServicePackage
entities.description: Concrete packages/plans/pricing options under each service (installation packages, sealing plans, seasonal snow removal plans, etc.)

fields.name: service_id
fields.description: References Service.id

fields.name: name
fields.description: Package/plan name shown on service.html

fields.name: base_price
fields.description: Total or starting price in dollars

fields.name: warranty_years
fields.description: Warranty duration in years, used for filtering 2-year, 3-year+

fields.name: recommended_min_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Minimum driveway size this package is suited for

fields.name: recommended_max_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Maximum driveway size this package is suited for

fields.name: supported_driveway_categories
fields.description: Array of driveway_category values this package supports (e.g., includes two_car for 2-car driveways)

fields.name: supported_surface_types
fields.description: Array of driveway surface types, e.g. ['asphalt', 'concrete']

fields.name: includes_crack_filling
fields.description: True if plan explicitly includes crack filling (for sealing plans)

fields.name: max_visits
fields.description: For seasonal plans like snow removal; used for 'up to 20 visits'

fields.name: max_driveway_length_ft
fields.description: Max driveway length covered by the plan

entities.name: Booking
entities.description: Bookings or enrollment records created via booking.html and reviewed on booking_review.html

fields.name: service_id
fields.description: References Service.id

fields.name: service_package_id
fields.description: References ServicePackage.id when booking a specific package/plan

fields.name: driveway_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Area in square feet (e.g., 600, 550)

fields.name: size_unit
fields.description: Unit for size fields; sq ft for area or ft for length

fields.name: driveway_length_ft
fields.description: Used for snow removal (e.g., 50 ft driveway)

fields.name: driveway_category
fields.description: Categorical size, e.g. 2-car driveway

fields.name: material_option
fields.description: If a material/finish is chosen as part of booking

fields.name: scheduled_date
fields.description: Selected service date (weekday/Saturday, etc.)

fields.name: time_slot_start
fields.description: Start time of the selected time slot, e.g. '09:00'

fields.name: time_slot_end
fields.description: End time of the selected time slot, e.g. '11:00'

fields.name: billing_option
fields.description: Used for snow removal billing options

fields.name: applied_promo_code
fields.description: Promo code entered on booking_review.html

fields.name: subtotal_price
fields.description: Price before discounts

fields.name: total_price
fields.description: Final price after promotions

fields.name: source_page
fields.description: Where the booking flow was initiated

entities.name: QuoteRequest
entities.description: Generic quote/estimate requests submitted via quote.html (including those pre-filled from promotions or crew pages)

fields.name: driveway_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Driveway/project size (e.g., 400, 550, 650)

fields.name: material_option
fields.description: Used for options like Standard asphalt resurfacing

fields.name: preferred_date
fields.description: Requested date (earliest weekday within 30 days, etc.)

fields.name: preferred_time_window_start
fields.description: Start time of requested window, e.g. '09:00'

fields.name: preferred_time_window_end
fields.description: End time of requested window, e.g. '11:00'

fields.name: promo_code
fields.description: Promo applied or referenced on the quote

fields.name: crew_id
fields.description: If the quote is tied to a specific crew (from crew.html)

entities.name: Promotion
entities.description: Promotions and promo codes listed on promotions.html and applied on booking_review.html

fields.name: code
fields.description: Exact promo code text, e.g. 'PAVE15'

fields.name: discount_percent
fields.description: Percent off, e.g. 15 for 15%

fields.name: discount_amount
fields.description: Fixed dollar amount off

fields.name: min_project_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Minimum project size requirement (e.g., 500 sq ft)

fields.name: eligible_service_types
fields.description: Array of service_type values this promotion applies to

fields.name: source_page_link
fields.description: Deep-link URL or parameter to start booking/quote with this promo

entities.name: Project
entities.description: Completed projects in the gallery (gallery.html and project.html)

fields.name: surface_type
fields.description: Used to filter Asphalt Driveways, Concrete, etc.

fields.name: size_sq_ft
fields.description: Approximate driveway size for filtering (e.g., 400–800 sq ft)

fields.name: completion_date
fields.description: Used to filter projects completed in last 2 years

fields.name: images
fields.description: Array of image URLs

entities.name: FavoriteProjects
entities.description: Single-user favorites/saved project list shown on favorites.html

fields.name: id
fields.description: Single record, e.g., 'default'

fields.name: project_ids
fields.description: Array of Project.id values the user has saved

entities.name: ZipArea
entities.description: ZIP-level coverage items used on service_area.html

fields.name: zip_code
fields.description: 5-digit ZIP, e.g. '30301'

fields.name: is_served
fields.description: Whether services are directly offered in this ZIP

fields.name: service_area_id
fields.description: References ServiceArea.id

entities.name: ServiceArea
entities.description: Named service areas or regions linked from service_area.html?areaId=...

fields.name: name
fields.description: Area name, e.g., 'Downtown Atlanta'

fields.name: covered_zip_codes
fields.description: Array of ZIP codes that belong to this service area

entities.name: ServiceAreaInquiry
entities.description: Inquiries about extending service to non-served ZIPs submitted via service_area.html

fields.name: searched_zip_code
fields.description: ZIP entered by the user, e.g., '30301'

fields.name: nearest_served_zip_code
fields.description: Nearest served ZIP seen/selected by the user

fields.name: service_area_id
fields.description: If user clicked a specific service area before contacting

fields.name: message
fields.description: User’s request about extending service

entities.name: Crew
entities.description: Work crews/contractors listed on crews.html and detailed on crew.html

fields.name: service_types
fields.description: Array of service_type values such as asphalt_driveway_replacement

fields.name: overall_rating
fields.description: Average star rating (0–5, supports 4.5+ filtering)

fields.name: review_count
fields.description: Total number of reviews (supports 50+ filtering)

fields.name: service_area_ids
fields.description: Array of ServiceArea.id values served by this crew

entities.name: CrewReview
entities.description: Individual user reviews for crews, used to compute ratings and counts

fields.name: crew_id
fields.description: References Crew.id

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Star rating for this review

entities.name: EstimateRequest
entities.description: Crew-specific estimate requests submitted from crew.html

fields.name: crew_id
fields.description: References Crew.id

fields.name: service_type
fields.description: e.g., Asphalt Driveway Replacement

fields.name: driveway_size_sq_ft
fields.description: Approximate size, e.g., 650

entities.name: ContactMessage
entities.description: General contact form submissions from contact.html

fields.name: related_service_id
fields.description: Optional reference to Service.id if the inquiry is about a specific service
